articles.author: Andrew Jones
articles.title: Eurovision, the glitzy contest where music meets politics, is adding an Asian edition - NBC News
articles.description: The Eurovision Song Contest said Tuesday that it will hold its first-ever Asia edition in Bangkok on Nov. 14.
articles.content:
Dust off the sequins and stock up on the pyrotechnics: The Eurovision Song Contest is coming to Asia.
The organizers of Eurovision, the glitzy singing contest that draws Super Bowl-like viewership e… [+3047 chars]
